calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Northside Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Northside Independent School District is Monday, August 10, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Northside Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Northside Independent School District runs Mar 8, 2027–Mar 12, 2027, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day moves from Aug 11 to Aug 10 vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Oct Break Expanded
yearNumbers.detail: Oct 9, 12, and 13 are all no-school days vs just Oct 13 in 2025–2026, creating a near-week-long break around Columbus/Indigenous Peoples' Day.

yearNumbers.label: Ends Later
yearNumbers.detail: Last day moves from May 21 to May 26 vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Battle of Flowers
yearNumbers.detail: Battle of Flowers / Fiesta holiday continues — a San Antonio tradition unique to Bexar County districts.

calendarNotes: Northside ISD begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 10, 2026, and the last day of school is May 26, 2027. Spring Break runs March 8–12; a teacher planning day on March 15 means students don't return to class until March 16. One calendar date unique to Northside ISD is April 23 — the Battle of Flowers holiday, observed across Bexar County schools and tied to San Antonio's Fiesta celebration.
